title: phaseolus longepedunculatus f. typicus
intro: Phaseolus longepedunculatus f. typicus, also known as wild kidney bean, is a variant of the common bean (Phaseolus coccineus). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Phaseolus longepedunculatus f. typicus include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting cardiovascular health. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
